name: Detroit Low Cost Bankruptcy Attorneys
description_short: Detroit-area bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 bankruptcy filings with advertised low fees and a money-back guarantee if cases are declined due to attorney error.
description_long:
Detroit Low Cost Bankruptcy Attorneys operates through BankruptcyMax.org, a Michigan-based law firm serving the Detroit metropolitan area and surrounding communities. The firm focuses exclusively on bankruptcy representation, primarily Chapter 7 filings, positioning itself as an affordable alternative in the bankruptcy legal market. They maintain multiple office locations across Wayne County and surrounding areas, including Allen Park, Dearborn, Garden City, Livonia, and other Detroit suburbs.

The firm offers comprehensive Chapter 7 bankruptcy services, including petition preparation, financial document filing, means testing eligibility assessment, and representation before bankruptcy courts. They handle the full bankruptcy process from initial consultation through debt discharge, with stated services including creditor communication, wage garnishment stops, and protection against foreclosure and vehicle repossession. Free case evaluations are offered to prospective clients, with phone consultants available at multiple phone numbers ((313) 982-0010, (248) 996-8479, and (248) 281-6299).

The company differentiates itself through a "Money Back Guarantee" promising 100% refund of legal fees if the bankruptcy court declines the filing due to attorney error. They also offer free amendment services for any petition errors attributed to the firm and claim to handle all creditor communications after client retention. Marketing emphasizes "low" and "affordable" fees, though specific pricing is not disclosed on the website.

The website contains multiple grammatical errors and awkward phrasing ("Emergencey," "our your unsecured"), which raises questions about the firm's attention to detail. No attorney credentials, experience levels, bar certifications, or client reviews are provided. The site lacks information about Chapter 13 bankruptcy despite mentioning it briefly. The money-back guarantee excludes court decisions, which is the primary outcome factor in bankruptcy cases, limiting its practical value.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free initial case evaluation and consultation with bankruptcy attorney
Money-back guarantee if case declined due to attorney error (100% legal fee refund)
Immediate creditor call handling and communication management after client retention
Services cover multiple Michigan counties with offices in 17+ Detroit-area municipalities
Claims to provide free amendment services for petition errors made by the firm
Advertises low/affordable fees for Chapter 7 bankruptcy filings
Immediate legal protections claimed upon filing (stops garnishment, foreclosure, repossession actions)
cons: Website contains numerous grammatical errors and typos, suggesting lack of quality control
No attorney names, credentials, experience levels, or bar certifications provided
No client testimonials, reviews, or case outcomes disclosed
Money-back guarantee explicitly excludes unfavorable court rulings—the primary outcome factor in bankruptcy
Chapter 13 bankruptcy mentioned only in passing with no detailed services description; focus appears limited to Chapter 7
Specific fee information not disclosed on website despite 'low cost' marketing claims
best_for: Detroit-area residents with unsecured debt (credit cards, medical bills, personal loans) seeking Chapter 7 bankruptcy
Individuals currently experiencing wage garnishment, creditor harassment, or foreclosure/repossession risk
Michigan residents whose income falls below state median income and qualify for Chapter 7 means testing
diagnosis: Best for Detroit-area residents facing immediate debt collection, garnishment, or foreclosure who need Chapter 7 bankruptcy filing and qualify under the means test. Primary caveat: the firm's website quality and lack of attorney credentials or client reviews make independent verification of experience and competency difficult; the money-back guarantee provides limited protection since it excludes unfavorable court decisions, which determine actual bankruptcy outcomes.
services: Chapter 7 bankruptcy petition preparation and filing
Means test eligibility assessment and review
Wage garnishment stop and creditor call handling
Bankruptcy petition amendment services (if firm error occurs)
Asset exemption analysis under Michigan/federal bankruptcy law
Multi-location service coverage across Detroit metropolitan area
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
